validation_outcome: Repo build clean (make from repo root, exit 0). Full suite ./SSWTests: 217 run, 1 failure, 0 errors. No other test failures were observed. tests/weapons has no standalone WeaponsTests binary target (module Makefile only builds libweaponsTests.a); ./SSWTests is the actual full-suite entry point that links and runs FDisruptorCannonTest.
